## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX Labs to discuss SEO strategy, content production, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO metrics saw volatility: 53% increase in impressions last week, 45% decrease this week; engaged sessions dropped only 10%](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [50+ glossary pages and 27 editorial pieces approved for upcoming content production](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Team to integrate quarterly performance tracking against targets for the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [New content director to be hired at Abnormal, potentially joining future discussions](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance and Reporting

  - [Recent Google algorithm changes impacted impressions across multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Team to develop stronger keyword list and forecasting for internal reporting](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Plan to create an SEO dashboard tracking star keywords and their performance](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Abdallah requested quarterly performance tracking against set targets (best case, average, low scenarios)](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [50+ glossary pages and 27 editorial pieces approved for upcoming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [10 ideas pending review by Threat Intel team (delayed due to Callie's PTO)](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Mixing glossary pages with editorial content for balanced production](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Exploring new content types beyond glossary pages (e.g., attack repositories)](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Meaghan considering site navigation changes, focusing on community and developer-oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)

### Team Updates and Collaboration

  - [Meaghan Winston joined Abnormal Security recently (week 3)](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [New content director to be hired, will join future discussions](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### Content Refresh and Industry Sections

  - [Black Friday scams content refreshed; more refreshes planned](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

  - [Team balancing new content production with refreshes to maintain publishing velocity](https://fathom.video/share/b-aFMxiCe9xpqT8epWY8LgHqvT4Lk5rC?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
